title: union mixed arrays and objects
description: Untagged union mixing array members (string[] | number[] | boolean[]) and object members ({a; aa} | {b} | {c: bigint; aa: "string"}). Dispatch first splits on array-vs-object kind, then resolves the matched shape structurally. The {c: bigint} object arm carries bigint↔string.
notes: No literal discriminator across the family — array members are told apart from object members by structural kind, then by element type or required keys.
schema:
JsonEncoder(
  RT.union([
    RT.array(RT.string()),
    RT.array(RT.number()),
    RT.array(RT.boolean()),
    RT.object({a: RT.string(), aa: RT.boolean()}),
    RT.object({b: RT.number()}),
    RT.object({c: RT.bigint(), aa: RT.literal('string')}),
  ])
)
